top_findings.summary: The skill description states integration with "Feishu documentation for reports" (a third-party cloud service) without explicit user consent or data handling disclosure. While monitoring public GitHub trending data is reasonable, automatically sending user-generated reports or bookmarks to external commercial services without clear opt-in/out mechanisms exceeds the stated purpose of "monitoring and tracking for self-enhancement". Additionally, the "daily memory files for trend logging" could involve writing to local storage without clear boundaries.
